A_periodic_table_stability.falsifier: Example dataset that breaks axis independence
A_periodic_table_stability.test_condition: A mechanism that universally requires C1 (Basin Commitment) to increase proportionally whenever C2 (Expression Capacity) increases, without exception.

A_periodic_table_stability.falsifier: Example coordination regime that fails B3 bridge
A_periodic_table_stability.test_condition: A multi-agent consensus network (C3) that successfully resolves high-entropy disputes without establishing a hierarchical operator gradient (P5).

B_os_integration_imports.falsifier: Example symbolic depth case that does not increase collapse risk
B_os_integration_imports.test_condition: A policy stack nested infinitely deep that compiles and resolves action paths in strictly O(1) time without abstracting away the physical constraint layer.

B_os_integration_imports.falsifier: Example template graph that grows without combinatorial collapse
B_os_integration_imports.test_condition: An unbounded inclusion graph that requires no resource truncation (post-expand limits) yet never encounters memory exhaustion or cyclic rendering deadlocks.
